summary: Testing MuscleGrid CRM fixes for iteration 8 - All 5 reported issues verified FIXED: 1) Accountant Dashboard loads without React error 2) Dispatcher can confirm dispatch 3) Customer can download pickup label 4) Ticket number consistency 5) Repair notes visible to customer
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (Fixed: dispatch status endpoint now accepts Form data instead of query param)
/app/backend/tests/test_crm_fixes_v8.py (Created: new test file for this iteration)
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 reported issues are now fixed. Dispatch status endpoint fixed to accept Form data. Customer can see repair notes and download pickup labels.

accountant_dashboard_no_react_error.details: Dashboard loads without React errors. All APIs return proper arrays: dispatches (41 items), tickets (89 items), SKUs (11 items)

dispatcher_confirm_dispatch.details: Fixed backend endpoint to accept Form data (status=dispatched). Dispatcher can click Dispatch button, confirm dialog opens, Confirm Dispatch button works, success toast shows 'Marked as dispatched', queue count decreases correctly

customer_download_pickup_label.details: Customer ticket details shows 'Pickup Label Ready' orange section with Download Label button. Shows courier (Delhivery/FedEx) and tracking info. Download URL works correctly

ticket_number_consistency.details: Ticket numbers maintain MG-R-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX format throughout entire workflow. Same ticket number shown in list, details, and history

repair_notes_visible_to_customer.details: Customer ticket details shows 'Repair Completed' green section with repair notes, repaired timestamp. Visible for tickets with status repair_completed

bug_fix_applied.issue: Frontend sends FormData but backend expected query parameter
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed 'status: str' to 'status: str = Form(...)' in endpoint signature

ui_verification_screenshots.accountant_dashboard: Shows 4 tabs (From Supervisor, Repaired, Outbound, Upload Labels), stats cards, and ticket cards
ui_verification_screenshots.dispatcher_dashboard: Shows Ready to Dispatch (56 items), Dispatched Today, Total in Queue stats. Green Dispatch buttons on each row
ui_verification_screenshots.dispatcher_confirm_dialog: Modal shows dispatch details (Dispatch #, Customer, Courier, Tracking) with Cancel and Confirm Dispatch buttons
ui_verification_screenshots.customer_tickets_list: Shows ticket list with status badges (label_uploaded, new_request, etc.)
ui_verification_screenshots.customer_ticket_with_pickup_label: Shows 'Pickup Label Ready' section with orange Download Label button, courier and tracking info
ui_verification_screenshots.customer_ticket_with_repair_notes: Shows 'Repair Completed' green section with repair notes and timestamp
